auto_paid_claims.claim: According to Section 4.2, if the Monthly Uptime Percentage falls below 99.5% by exactly 4%, the Customer is entitled to a service credit of 20% of the monthly Fees, which is the maximum credit allowed per month under the SLA.

The Processor is allowed to engage Sub-Processors an unlimited number of times per year, as long as it provides Controller with at least thirty (30) days’ prior written notice each time, effectively permitting multiple Sub-Processor changes annually without restriction.
